configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: Default local development build using clang and ninja.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Optimised release build. Uses the system default C++ compiler; any C++20-capable toolchain (clang, GCC, MSVC, Apple Clang) works. Requires Ninja.

configurePresets.name: release-clang
configurePresets.description: Same as release but pins clang++ — useful when the system default is GCC.

configurePresets.name: release-vs
configurePresets.description: Release build for MSVC users who open the project in Visual Studio. No generator is specified so Visual Studio picks its own (MSBuild); Ninja is not required. CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE is intentionally omitted because multi-config generators ignore it — the build preset passes --config Release instead.

configurePresets.name: observer
configurePresets.description: Development build with deterministic observer-only recording tools enabled.

configurePresets.name: ci
configurePresets.description: Release build for CI runners (Linux/macOS). Pins clang++ because CI scripts install it explicitly.

configurePresets.name: ci-windows
configurePresets.description: Release build for Windows CI runners. Uses MSVC via Ninja; compiler is not pinned so CMake picks cl.exe from the MSVC dev-cmd environment. freeglut is supplied by vcpkg.
